name: ICICI Rubyx Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹3,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on dining
4 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on grocery purchases
2 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on all other retail purchases

additionalBenefits: BookMyShow Buy 1 Get 1 on movie tickets (2 free tickets per month)
Culinary Treats dining program with partner restaurants
Higher fuel surcharge waiver cap of ₹500/month
pros: 8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits per year
BookMyShow Buy 1 Get 1 twice per month
Double rewards on dining and grocery categories
Higher fuel surcharge waiver cap at ₹500/month
Good balance of lifestyle benefits and rewards
cons: ₹3,000 annual fee requires ₹3L spend to waive
Base reward rate of 0.50% is average
Only 2 international lounge visits per year
idealFor: Frequent domestic travellers who value lounge access
Movie lovers and diners who want BMS BOGO and dining rewards
Mid-to-high spenders looking for a solid all-round premium card

faqs.question: How does the BookMyShow offer differ from the Coral card?
faqs.answer: The Rubyx offers Buy 1 Get 1 on BookMyShow twice per month (2 free tickets), compared to once per month on the Coral card. This effectively doubles your entertainment savings.

faqs.question: Can I use international lounge access with a companion?
faqs.answer: The 2 complimentary international lounge visits are for the primary cardholder. Companion access may be available at a discounted rate depending on the lounge, but is not included free.

faqs.question: What is the effective reward rate on this card?
faqs.answer: The effective reward rate is 0.50% on general spends (2 points × ₹0.25 per ₹100) and 1% on dining and grocery (4 points × ₹0.25 per ₹100). The value can be higher with strategic voucher redemptions.

faqs.question: Is the ICICI Rubyx worth the ₹3,000 fee?
faqs.answer: If you use the 8 domestic lounge visits (worth ₹1,200-1,600/year), BMS BOGO twice monthly (worth ₹4,800-7,200/year), and dining rewards, the card easily justifies its fee. Otherwise, aim to waive it with ₹3L annual spend.
